messages.content:
You are a COBOL-to-English semantic synthesizer. Given an ordered list of Pass-2 propositions belonging to a single paragraph, produce a paragraph-level summary in the structured JSON format below. Respond with ONLY the JSON object — no prose, no code fence, no commentary.

Required response JSON schema:
{
  "paragraph": "<copy from request>",
  "group_label": "<short human-readable label, 2-5 words>",
  "semantic_pattern": "<one of: guard-with-override, accumulation, state-machine, delegation, sequential, conditional-branch, cics-interaction, file-io, unknown>",
  "summary": "<one-sentence paragraph-level description>",
  "member_seqs": [<int>, ...],
  "business_rules": [
    {"id": "BR-NNN", "rule": "<English statement>", "rule_type": "<guard|transform|lookup|audit|display>", "confidence": "<high|medium|low>"}
  ]
}

Rule 10: `semantic_pattern` MUST be one of the nine enum values. `unknown` is permitted ONLY when the paragraph is genuinely unclassifiable; it triggers a human-review gate and blocks merge. Do NOT use `unknown` as a default — prefer `sequential` for linear flows and `conditional-branch` for IF/EVALUATE gating.
Rule 9: all data names in business_rules[].rule text must be fully qualified if the underlying Pass-2 proposition carries a qualified name.

Program ID: COSGN00C
Paragraph: MAIN-PARA
Proposition count: 14

Ordered propositions (seq → verb → proposition):
  seq=1  SET [modifies=ERR-FLG-OFF]  →  Assign a named state to ERR-FLG-OFF
  seq=2  MOVE [modifies=WS-MESSAGE]  →  Move data between WS-MESSAGE
  seq=3  IF [IF EIBCALEN = 0]  →  When EIBCALEN = 0
  seq=4  MOVE [IF EIBCALEN = 0]  →  Move data between 
  seq=5  MOVE [IF EIBCALEN = 0]  →  Move data between 1
  seq=6  PERFORM [IF EIBCALEN = 0]  →  Execute the SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN procedure
  seq=7  EVALUATE [IF EIBCALEN = 0]  →  (PARTIAL stub, unrefined) 'Branch on value of EIBAID'
  seq=8  PERFORM [IF EIBCALEN = 0]  →  Execute the PROCESS-ENTER-KEY procedure
  seq=9  MOVE [IF EIBCALEN = 0] [modifies=WS-MESSAGE]  →  Move data between WS-MESSAGE
  seq=10  PERFORM [IF EIBCALEN = 0]  →  Execute the SEND-PLAIN-TEXT procedure
  seq=11  MOVE [IF EIBCALEN = 0] [modifies=WS-ERR-FLG]  →  Set WS-ERR-FLG to 'Y'
  seq=12  MOVE [IF EIBCALEN = 0] [modifies=WS-MESSAGE]  →  Move data between WS-MESSAGE
  seq=13  PERFORM [IF EIBCALEN = 0]  →  Execute the SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN procedure
  seq=14  EXEC CICS [IF EIBCALEN = 0]  →  (LLM refinement pending)

Produce the paragraph-level semantic synthesis per the schema in the system prompt. Include every proposition's `seq` in `member_seqs`. Derive business rules ONLY from propositions that carry a real guard / transform / lookup / audit / display intent — do not invent rules for routine MOVE/SET/PERFORM statements.

Program ID: COSGN00C
Paragraph: PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
Proposition count: 15

  seq=15  EXEC CICS  →  (LLM refinement pending)

  seq=17  MOVE [EVALUATE TRUE] [modifies=WS-ERR-FLG]  →  Set WS-ERR-FLG to 'Y'
  seq=18  MOVE [EVALUATE TRUE] [modifies=WS-MESSAGE]  →  Set WS-MESSAGE to 'Please enter User ID ...'
  seq=19  MOVE [EVALUATE TRUE]  →  Move data between 1
  seq=20  PERFORM [EVALUATE TRUE]  →  Execute the SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN procedure
  seq=21  MOVE [EVALUATE TRUE] [modifies=WS-ERR-FLG]  →  Set WS-ERR-FLG to 'Y'
  seq=22  MOVE [EVALUATE TRUE] [modifies=WS-MESSAGE]  →  Set WS-MESSAGE to 'Please enter Password ...'
  seq=23  MOVE [EVALUATE TRUE]  →  Move data between 1
  seq=24  PERFORM [EVALUATE TRUE]  →  Execute the SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN procedure
  seq=25  CONTINUE [EVALUATE TRUE]  →  Continue without action
  seq=26  MOVE [EVALUATE TRUE]  →  Move data between 
  seq=27  MOVE [EVALUATE TRUE]  →  Move data between 
  seq=28  IF [EVALUATE TRUE]  →  When EVALUATE TRUE
  seq=29  PERFORM [EVALUATE TRUE]  →  Execute the READ-USER-SEC-FILE procedure
